Down payment assistance

Assistance is part of the plan, not a standalone promise.

See which details determine program fit, understand how assistance can affect the first mortgage, and prepare for a current eligibility review.

View today's DPA ratesCheck the starting factors

What changes the answer

The program name is only the beginning.

The useful question is not simply whether assistance exists. It is whether a currently funded option fits the location, household, first mortgage, timeline, and full file.

  • County or city where the home will be purchased
  • Household size and program-specific income calculation
  • First-time homebuyer definition and possible exceptions
  • Credit, debt-to-income ratio, reserves, and approved first mortgage
  • Homebuyer education, funding availability, and closing timeline

Plan the complete cost

Assistance can reduce cash needed upfront, but it may come with a second lien or repayment rules.

Compare the interest rate, total payment, assistance terms, required cash, future sale or refinance impact, and an option without assistance.

Daily program pricing

Today's Florida Housing DPA rate snapshot.

Compare the first-mortgage lock rates attached to major statewide assistance paths. Then compare the complete payment and assistance terms.

Last verified snapshotPosted July 10, 2026

Standard Bond

FL Assist $10,000 or FL HLP $12,500

640 minimum program scoreCurrently posted
FHA, VA, or USDA-RD
6.750%
Fannie Mae HFA Preferred
7.500%
Freddie Mac HFA Advantage
7.250%
Check my DPA starting factorsOpen official rate source
Current program noteHometown Heroes 2026 is anticipated to become available July 13, 2026.

Program lock rates are not ordinary retail rate quotes and do not guarantee eligibility, approval, funds, or a lock. Rates may change during the day. Income, purchase price, property, first-time-buyer rules, loan type, participating lender requirements, and available funding still apply. County programs may not publish one daily first-mortgage rate.

Program map

Three places to look, followed by one complete comparison.

These are broad program families, not a list of guaranteed benefits. Details and funding can change.

01

Statewide programs

Florida Housing programs can combine an eligible first mortgage with assistance. Income, purchase price, education, credit, and first-time-buyer rules can apply.

02

County and city programs

Local programs may offer forgivable, deferred, or repayable assistance. Funding windows and geographic boundaries matter.

03

Occupation and service paths

Some programs are shaped around an eligible occupation, military service, or veteran status. The definition and current availability must be verified.

Quick fit check

Start with the details that narrow the search.

This is deliberately shorter than an application. It prepares a useful conversation without pretending that four answers determine approval.

This is an educational starting review, not a commitment to lend or a determination of eligibility. Consent is not a condition of obtaining services.

Your next move

Compare assistance with a low-down-payment option before you choose.

Dennis can review the current assistance terms alongside the complete payment and cash-to-close picture.
